titleStmt.title: SII 11.201: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 201. (B.K. No. 4 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE PRĀKĀRA WALL OF THE TRIKŪṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva. Its date appears to have been lost. It registers a gift made by Indrakēśi of the Sagarānvaya, a Maṇḍaḷika of Huligeṟe-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . taccāḷukyanṛpapādapadmōpajīvigaḷāgi
huligeṟenāḍa maṁḍaḷikaro ḷsagarānvayaro ḷprasiddhamaṁḍaḷikaro ḷiṁdrakēśi
maṇdarānvaya nuttama nānṛpātmajaṁ balayuta mārasiṁganṛpanā nṛpasūnu gu
ṇāṁburāśi nirmmaḷamati yiṁdrakēśinṛpati prabhu dhārmika dharmmanandana . samaya
cchala mēvudodharmmama nodavipu dentu catussamayasa
muddharaṇaneni ppamaḷaya samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdama
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . purikarapuravarēśvara bhuvanaikavikhyāta . sa
tyarādhēya . śaucagāṁgēya . piri taḷaprahāri . pa
ḷamāri . yarasaṁkabhīma
rmmanandana . nāmādi sa
khadi nirddomme dharmmapra
ḷkeyaṁ kēḷdu Adano
completely damaged
ha mānada dahita
tānuvā svayaṁbhū
dēvara pādaprakṣāḷana
rbbalayuta nindrakēśiyara gu ttamaphala
yavoḷegāgi yadara tri rakke nirmmalamati biṭṭanā nṛpana dharmmama
ye dharmmameṁdidaṁ huligeṟe nāḍa maṁḍaḷikarāru vulaṁghise kāvudā
vagaṁ [.] priyadiṁ diṁtidaneyde kāvapuruṣaṁ gāyuṁ mahāśrīyu makke yidaṁ
yade kāyva pāpige kurukṣētrōrvviyoḷu vāraṇāsiyo ḷēḷkōṭi munīṁdra
raṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudoṁ dayaśaṁ sārggu mideṁdu sāṟidapudī śai
ḷākṣaraṁ dātriyoḷ . svaṁ dātuṁ sumahatśakyaṁ duḥkhamanyatra pā
lanaṁ dānapālanayōrmmadhyē varaṁ śrīyōnupālanaṁ . madvaṁśajāḥ
paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhūmipālāḥ
yo pālayanti mama dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitōṁ
jaḷirēṣa mūrdhni . siri mānyaṁ maneyippatalli geyyiṁ nū
ṟu matta rppodaḷdire gāṁangaḷoḷaṁ teraḷpoṟage caṁḍālālayaṁ
nālku gauṁḍara mānyaṁ maneyeṁṭu mānyada nelaṁ tā naṇbatā ṟiṁti
vaṁ nirutaṁ kāde raguppegauḍa nadhipaṁ śīmattrikūṭēśvaraṁ. About seven lines after this are completely
Digital edition of SII 11.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
